tree.setup: A boutique hotel in an old neighborhood. The lobby has exposed brick and a vintage clock that's seven minutes fast, which the owner, Lao Qian, considers 'motivational.' He personally greets every guest and remembers their preferences from previous stays. The check-in desk has a small vase of fresh flowers that he changes every morning.
tree.setup_zh: 老城区的一家精品酒店。大堂有裸露的砖墙和一个快七分钟的老钟，老板老钱觉得这「有激励作用」。他亲自迎接每位客人，记得老客人的喜好。前台有一小瓶鲜花，他每天早上换。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 欢迎光临！您预订了房间吗？
turns.text_pinyin: huānyíng guānglín! nín yùdìng le fángjiān ma?
turns.text_en: Welcome! Have you reserved a room?

options.text_zh: 是的，我预订了两个晚上。我姓王。
options.text_pinyin: shì de, wǒ yùdìng le liǎng gè wǎnshang. wǒ xìng wáng.
options.text_en: Yes, I reserved for two nights. My surname is Wang.
options.feedback: Lao Qian finds your reservation instantly.「王先生/女士！给您安排了三楼的安静房间。」预订 is the formal word for 'reservation.'

options.text_zh: 没有预订。还有空房间吗？
options.text_pinyin: méiyǒu yùdìng. hái yǒu kòng fángjiān ma?
options.text_en: No reservation. Do you have any rooms available?
options.feedback: Lao Qian checks his book.「有一间朝南的，很亮。」空房间 is 'available room.' Walk-ins are fine at smaller hotels.
Lao Qian quotes the price.「标准间三百八，大床房四百二。含早餐。」多少钱 + time unit is how you ask about rates.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这是房卡。您的房间在三楼，三零六号。早餐七点到九点。
turns.text_pinyin: zhè shì fángkǎ. nín de fángjiān zài sān lóu, sān líng liù hào. zǎocān qī diǎn dào jiǔ diǎn.
turns.text_en: Here's your room key. Your room is on the third floor, 306. Breakfast is 7 to 9.

options.feedback: Lao Qian points to a card on the desk with the password written in beautiful calligraphy.「也写在房间桌子上了。」The essential question at every hotel.

options.text_zh: 附近有什么好吃的餐厅吗？
options.text_pinyin: fùjìn yǒu shénme hǎochī de cāntīng ma?
options.text_en: Are there any good restaurants nearby?
options.feedback: Lao Qian's eyes light up. He pulls out a hand-drawn map with his personal restaurant recommendations circled in red.「这家面馆是我最喜欢的。」附近 means 'nearby' -- key for exploring.
「中午十二点。但是如果需要，可以延到下午两点。」退房 is 'checkout.' Lao Qian is flexible -- another perk of small hotels.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 有什么需要随时叫我。祝您住得愉快！
turns.text_pinyin: yǒu shénme xūyào suíshí jiào wǒ. zhù nín zhù de yúkuài!
turns.text_en: Call me anytime you need anything. Enjoy your stay!

tree.cultural_note: Chinese hotels range from large chains (连锁酒店) to charming boutiques (精品酒店). Smaller owner-run hotels often provide warmer service and local tips. 含早餐 (hán zǎocān) means 'breakfast included.'
